approaches.title: Stack-based replacement with backfill
approaches.summary: Uses a stack to track indices of elements to remove, then backfills with non-matching elements from the end.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial stack-based approach with backfill logic.

approaches.title: Two-pointer overwrite
approaches.summary: Iterates through the array with a pointer tracking the position to write non-matching elements.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Simplified to a two-pointer overwrite method with O(n) time and O(1) space.

approaches.title: Retain method
approaches.summary: Uses Rust's retain method to filter out elements matching the target value.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Directly uses retain to remove elements, concise but less explicit.
